popularStory.headline: Ruthin Castle
popularStory.description:
From Wikipedia

Ruthin Castle (Welsh: Castell Rhuthun) is a medieval castle fortification in Wales, near the town of Ruthin in the Vale of Clwyd. It was constructed during the late 13th century by Daf …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Grey於1286年出生在威爾士丹比爾盧時，他的父親Baron John de Grey28歲，母親Maud de Verdun30歲。他於1314年之前與Elizabeth de Hastings在威爾士丹比爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和9個女兒的父母。他於1324年被列為summoned to pariament。他去世於1353年3月6日在他的家鄉享年67歲，埋葬在威爾士丹比爾盧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger de Grey于1286年出生在威尔士丹比爾盧时，他的父亲Baron John de Grey28岁，母亲Maud de Verdun30岁。他于1314年之前与Elizabeth de Hastings在威尔士丹比爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和9个女儿的父母。他于1324年被列为summoned to pariament。他去世于1353年3月6日在他的家乡享年67岁，埋葬在威尔士丹比爾盧。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Grey was born in 1286, in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales, his father, Baron John de Grey, was 28 and his mother, Maud de Verdun, was 30. He married Elizabeth de Hastings before 1314, in Denbighshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 9 daughters. In 1324, at the age of 38, his occupation is listed as summoned to pariament. He died on 6 March 1353, in his hometown, at the age of 67, and was buried in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Grey est né en 1286, à Ruthin, Denbighshire, Galles, son père, Baron John de Grey, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Maud de Verdun, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Hastings avant 1314, à Denbighshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 9 filles. En 1324, à l’âge de 38 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est summoned to pariament. Il est décédé le 6 mars 1353, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Ruthin, Denbighshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de Grey 1286 in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Baron John de Grey 28 und seine Mutter Maud de Verdun 30. Er hat vor 1314 in Denbighshire, Wales Elizabeth de Hastings geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 9 Töchter. 1324, als er 38 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als summoned to pariament aufgeführt. Er starb am 6. März 1353 im Alter von 67 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Grey è nato il nel 1286 nel Ruthin, Denbighshire, Galles, il suo padre, Baron John de Grey, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Maud de Verdun, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Hastings prima del 1314, nel Denbighshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 9 figlie. Nel 1324, all'età di 38 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come summoned to pariament. Morì il 6 marzo 1353, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Ruthin, Denbighshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Greyが1286年にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアルスインで生まれた時，父Baron John de Greyは28歳，母Maud de Verdunは30歳であった。1314年以前にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアでElizabeth de Hastingsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。1324年，38歳の時，職業はsummoned to pariamentと記録されている。彼は1353年3月6日に故郷で67歳で死去し，ウェールズデンビグhシュアイアルスインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Grey(이)가 1286년 웨일스 덴비그h실르 루스인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baron John de Grey(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Verdun(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1314년 이전 웨일스 덴비그h실르에서 Elizabeth de Hastings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 1324년, 38세의 나이로 그의 직업은 summoned to pariament이었다. 그는 1353년 3월 6일 그의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 덴비그h실르 루스인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Grey nasceu em 1286, em Ruthin, Denbighshire, Gales, seu pai, Baron John de Grey, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Verdun, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Hastings antes 1314, em Denbighshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 9 filhas. Em 1324, com 38 anos, sua profissão aparece como summoned to pariament. Ele faleceu em 6 de março de 1353, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Ruthin, Denbighshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Grey родился в 1286 г. в местности рутин, денбаишир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Baron John de Grey было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Verdun, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Hastings перед 1314 г. в местности денбаишир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 9 дочерей. В 1324 году, в возрасте 38 лет,  он работал по профессии summoned to pariament. Он умер 6 марта 1353 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности рутин, денбаишир, Уэльс.

sm.from 1324 to 1352: mai le 1324 e o'o I le 1352

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger de Grey nació en 1286, en Ruthin, Denbighshire, Gales, su papá, Baron John de Grey, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Maud de Verdun, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de Hastings antes de 1314, en Denbighshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 9 hijas. En 1324, a la edad de 38 años, su ocupación registrada era summoned to pariament. Murió el 6 de marzo de 1353, en su pueblo, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Ruthin, Denbighshire, Gales.
